title: Dataset
description: Descriptor for a tabular dataset loaded into DATAGLOW. Mirrors the `dataset` block embedded in a ProvenanceAttestation and the descriptor derivable from the app's in-memory dataset. Contains no row-level data — only shape/metadata — so it is safe to share without exposing PHI.

table.description: Logical table/dataset name. Null when unnamed.

rowCount.description: Number of rows. Null when unknown.

colCount.description: Number of columns. Null when unknown.

columns.description: Column descriptors, or null when not captured. Each item is either a bare column-name string or a { name, type } object.

loadedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the dataset was loaded. Null when unknown.
